title: Giant Pine Tree
description: Adds a Giant Pine Tree to the world
body:
### Giant Pine Tree

**This simple mod adds a Giant Pine Tree to the taiga and snwoy taiga biomes**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/614de32df37395e502c42617b513b04cb8b1f699.jpeg)

- The terrain around the pine tree is designed to blend naturally with the biome.
- Perfect spot to build a base nearby

![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a83103ed36a0c57781102047e2880f82b4640cd8.jpeg)

**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
